creator: patrik@hildingsson.se
text:
While issuing a backup with rsnapshot 1.4.1 I am met with "[2016-01-15T01:19:07] /usr/local/bin/rsnapshot sync: ERROR: /usr/local/bin/rsync returned 0.09375 while processing /"

However, downgrading to rsnapshot 1.4.0 finishes the same backup without any issues. Several fixes in upstream rsnapshot 1.4.2 addresses issues with rsync exit code. Having the port upgraded to include version 1.4.2 would be appreciated.

FYI lang/perl5-5.20.3_8 is installed on the system. No other perl5 installations present.
